summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, labels, comments, closes, or fix PRs are allowed. Classified the 10 listed open PR candidates independently, preserved linked security quarantine for #68527, and avoided inventing a shared canonical for this mixed inventory shard.
